title: Neznámý titulek
content: Colby Covington did almost exactly what everyone predicted he would do to Dillon Danis when the pair met in the co-main event of Real American Freestyle (RAF) 07 on March 28th, 2026. It was a mismatch right from the start really, as Covington is an NCAA Division I All-American and an NJCAA champion whereas Danis has never had a high-level wrestling match in his life. The extent of Danis’ wrestling experience is basically just some exposure in high school and whatever he’s trained for his BJJ and MMA careers. It was clear from the moment that the match was first announced that this was going to be a one-sided affair. Credit to Danis where it’s due though, it wasn’t a complete shutout. He actually managed to stay in it with Covington throughout the first period and ended with the score level at 4-4. Covington came out much more aggressive in the second period though, rattling off 10 points in quick succession to win by technical fall. They weren’t the only big names that BJJ fans will be familiar with competing at the event either, as Pat Downey lost by technical fall and Jason Nolf won by technical fall in some of the earliest matches. Then in the main event, the hotly-anticipated rematch between Arman Tsarukyan and Georgio Poullas ended in a clear-cut 9-3 victory for Tsarukyan. Real American Freestyle 07 Full Results Arman Tsarukyan defeats Georgio Poullas via Decision – 9 to 3 on Points Colby Covington defeats Dillon Danis via Technical Fall – 14 to 4 on Points Kyle Dake defeats Parker Keckeisen via Decision – 7 to 1 on Points Kyle Snyder defeats Akhmed Tazhudinov via Decision – Judges’ Decision Kennedy Blades defeats Milana Dudieva via Technical Fall – 11 to 0 on Points Wyatt Hendrickson defeats Trent Hillger via Decision – 6 to 2 on Points Bo Basset defeats Vladimer Khinchegashvili via Technical Fall – 13 to 3 on Points Aeoden Sinclair defeats Khidir Saipudinov via Decision – 9 to 4 on Points Jason Nolf defeats David Mistulov via Technical Fall – 10 to 0 on Points Trent Hidlay defeats Pat Downey via Technical Fall – 12 to 0 on Points Johnni DiJulius defeats Connor Beebe via Decision – 9 to 6 on Points Tags: Colby CovingtonDillon DanisReal American Freestyle
